name: Chiyoda Co., Ltd.
summary: Chiyoda Co., Ltd. engages in the retail of shoes, etc. It develops, manufactures, and sells shoes; and clothing products ranging from innerwear to legwear for men, women, and kids. As of June 30, 2020, the company operated 1,031 stores under the SHOE PLAZA, TSRC, CHIYODA HAKI-GOKOCHI, Chiyoda, cloverleaf, SPC, SHOE PLAZA park, SHOES Paletta, VifVif by cloverleaf, COURIPIE, and NATURA store names. Chiyoda Co., Ltd. was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
